description: This pipeline processes folder paths by converting them into folder data and then creates annotations for each path based on its name or full path, providing a streamlined workflow for organizing and labeling folders.

9d280d60-6797-4bd2-9ddb-91807f4ef17f.name: import-folder-list
9d280d60-6797-4bd2-9ddb-91807f4ef17f.description: Converts each provided path into folder data.

89849824-53a6-437f-ab06-9ef6aa51f091.name: path-to-annotation-simple
89849824-53a6-437f-ab06-9ef6aa51f091.description: Creates an annotation for each path based on its name or its full path.
